headline: EQT Corporation (EQT): A High-Growth Large Cap Stock Upgraded at Moody’s Ratings
summary: EQT Corporation (NYSE:EQT) is one of the high-growth large-cap stocks to invest in now. On May 30, Moody’s Ratings upgraded EQT Corp (NYSE:EQT) outlook to positive from stable. With the upgrade, the rating firm also affirmed the company’s Baa3 senior unsecured notes rating and Baa3 senior unsecured shelf rating. The Baa3 senior unsecured rating underscores […]
